title: ごめんなさい、でもいつか――

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Since that day, I'll often spot Meisho Doto training for her big race.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... O-one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze... S-so tired... No! I've got to keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how exhausted she looks, she just keeps pushing forward,
one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This will be... the best race everrrr!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh! Impressive, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the day of the Tracen Meet arrives! The stands are filled to
the brim with racers who have come to participate, and those here to
see them.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear? Opera O and Doto are gonna have it out in today's
1,800-meter race! Check out this flyer! "Doto vs. Opera O—A
Beautiful Symphony!"

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
"A Symphony"? Uh... Marketing aside, why Doto? I mean... She's just
gonna goof up, right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Finally, today's the day our symphony will ring louder and more
beautifully than any other! May the best racer win, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Okay... Shoes, check. Running number, check... Crippling nausea... None! I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All the racers have entered the gate... Who among them will be the
winner of today's 1,800-meter? And... they're off!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The racers have reached the third corner. The favorite for today, T.M.
Opera O, is in the center of the pack, but clearly has her eyes on the
front!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I-I can feel Opera O's presence... Now it's just a matter of time
before—)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the homestretch! T.M. Opera O races forward from the
outside!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Here she comes!)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The only fitting ending to today's story is... me taking another step
down the road to victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Sh-she's getting farther and farther away! Opera O really is amaz—)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, Meisho Doto loses her balance! Did she trip over herself?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Why? Why now of all times?! I-I really am a worthless—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I think tenacity's one of your strong points."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "I think tenacity's one of your strong points."

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Urrraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she quickly recovers! Now she's got her eyes on Opera O! Two
hundred meters to go... Will Opera O maintain her lead? Or will Doto
overtake her?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (I can catch up... I can pass her!)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto are battling it out for first place! Our
winner is... T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Sigh... I couldn't catch up after all...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Still... It's nice to see so many smiles... Maybe I was a good villain for
Opera O after all...)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, listen to those cheers! I feel the gazes of adoration upon me!
Excellent! Thank you, thank you, one and all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, the starring role is nothing without her supporting cast!
That's right, I speak of the villain with an indomitable spirit, the
tenacious Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eh?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She went up against my brilliant genius yet still managed to put on a
magnificent show! Let's hear it for Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Th-thank you very much, b-but why?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The persistence you showed in your training was beyond my
expectations, just as I expected! You proved once again I was right
about you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-but wasn't it just a coincidence that you chose me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What are you talking about?! In any case, I look forward to
racing you again, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto stands there, motionless, as the thunderous applause
rushes over her once more.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
What a race! I was so scared when I thought she was gonna fall! Nice
recovery, Doto! You really did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nobody's mocking Meisho Doto now. Excited, I rush down to her side.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So you came to watch the race too... Thank you. I-I'm just glad I was
able to finish... Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But you know... I feel like I took a step forward today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's clearly downplaying what she accomplished today, as well as
how hard she worked. Glancing down, I see all the bandages on her
legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This racer has fallen countless times and cried innumerable tears. Yet
every time, she wiped her eyes and picked herself back up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-where did that come from?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's change she wants, I know she has what it takes to make it
happen. After all... she never knows when to quit.
choice_data_list: I want to see where that strength takes you.
I want to see where that strength takes you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wait... Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What?! A-a-are you sure you want m-m-m-me?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-actually, I... I thought of your words while I was racing today!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You told me my tenacity is my strength... A-and that seemed to push
me forward. S-so, u-um…

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You told me my tenacity is my strength... A-and that seemed to push
me forward. S-so, u-um…

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-if you're by my side, I feel like I can change! So, um, I look forward
to working with you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stumble!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyah! I-I stepped on your foot?! A-are you okay?! Trainer?!
